subject: health
query_asked: how many canadians have a family doctor
cited_sources: cma.ca (2025 OurCare Survey); cbc.ca; angusreid.org; cfpc.ca; Statista; statcan.gc.ca (source rail, no value); cihi.ca
answer_value: 81% have a regular family doctor/NP; 5.9M lack primary-care access (OurCare 2025)
statcan_value: regular-provider rate in SHCAE (13100962, 2024) — fetch exact
note: StatCan's own 2024 access survey exists but the served numbers are the OurCare/CMA survey + Angus Reid; StatCan is a source link contributing no value
